step_rationale: Antioxidant; counters lipid oxidation in subendothelial retention.
mechanism: Vitamin E depletion reflects oxidative stress during LDL modification and lipid-core pathogenesis in atherosclerotic plaque.

references.title: A pilot study of streptokinase-induced endothelial injury and platelet activation following acute myocardial infarction.

trials.title: Pilot and Feasibility Study for a Pharmacogenomic Trial in Type 1 Diabetes
